---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
library(tidycensus)
library(tidyverse)
readRenviron("~/.Renviron")
library(tmap)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(spdep)
library(gstat)
library(nlme)
library(spatialreg)
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(patchwork)
library(GWmodel)
tmap_mode("view")
library(quantreg)
library(gamboostLSS)
library(caret)
library(e1071)
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
data <- read_csv("~/Downloads/sleep_health_dataset.csv")
table(data$country)
```

```{r}
data1 <- data %>% filter(country == "USA",
                         gender %in% c("Female", "Male")) %>% select(-country)
```

```{r}
table(data1$occupation)
```

```{r}
glimpse(data1)
```

```{r}
data2 <- data1 %>% select(where(is.numeric), -person_id)
```

```{r}
hist(data2$cognitive_performance_score)
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
library(ggplot2)
library(quantreg)

vars <- setdiff(names(data2), "cognitive_performance_score")

for (i in vars) {
  if (is.numeric(data2[[i]])) {

    tmp <- data2[, c(i, "cognitive_performance_score")]
    tmp <- na.omit(tmp)
    names(tmp) <- c("x", "y")

    if (length(unique(tmp$x)) > 5) {
      g <- ggplot(tmp, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "gold") +
        geom_smooth(method = "loess", formula = y ~ x, color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
        geom_quantile(quantiles = 0.5, color = "blue") +
        geom_quantile(quantiles = 0.25, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
        geom_quantile(quantiles = 0.75, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
        labs(x = i, y = "cognitive_performance_score", title = i) +
        theme_minimal()

      print(g)

      # Constant variances
      lm1 <- lm(data2[[i]] ~ cognitive_performance_score, data = data2)
      plot(lm1, which = 1)
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
cor_matrix <- cor(data2, use = "complete.obs")
round(cor_matrix, 2)
library(corrplot)
dev.new(width = 10, height = 10)
corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color", type = "upper",
         order = "hclust",
         tl.cex = 0.6,
         tl.srt = 45,
         addCoef.col = "black", number.cex = 0.4, 
         p.mat = cor.mtest(data2)$p,
         sig.level = 0.05,
         insig = "blank")
```

```{r}
data3 <- data2 %>% select(-felt_rested)
lm <- lm(cognitive_performance_score ~ ., data = data2)
# vif(lm)
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
null_model <- lm(cognitive_performance_score ~ 1, data = data2)
full_model <- lm(cognitive_performance_score ~ ., data = data2)

step_model <- step(null_model, 
                   scope = list(lower = null_model, upper = full_model),
                   direction = "forward")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

data4 <- data1 %>% group_by(occupation) %>% summarise(mean_sleep_quality = mean(sleep_quality_score))
ggplot(data4, aes(x = reorder(occupation, mean_sleep_quality), y = mean_sleep_quality)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
anova_model <- aov(sleep_quality_score ~ occupation, data = data1)
summary(anova_model)
```

How to pysical activity, stress and sleep quality affect cognitive performance,

```{r}
data1 <- data1 %>% select(-person_id)
```

```{r}
library(leaps)

# Fit all subset models
regfit <- regsubsets(cognitive_performance_score ~ ., data = data2, nvmax = ncol(data2) - 1)

# Extract subset summary
regsum <- summary(regfit)

# Variable names used by regsubsets output
vars <- colnames(regsum$which)

# Remove intercept from candidate predictors
pred_vars <- setdiff(vars, "(Intercept)")

# Build all lm models from regsubsets results
models <- list()
aic_vals <- numeric(nrow(regsum$which))

for (i in 1:nrow(regsum$which)) {
  chosen <- pred_vars[regsum$which[i, pred_vars]]
  
  if (length(chosen) == 0) {
    form <- cognitive_performance_score ~ 1
  } else {
    form <- as.formula(
      paste("cognitive_performance_score ~", paste(chosen, collapse = " + "))
    )
  }
  
  models[[i]] <- lm(form, data = data2)
  aic_vals[i] <- AIC(models[[i]])
}

# Best model by AIC
best_idx <- which.min(aic_vals)
best_model <- models[[best_idx]]

# Inspect
AIC(best_model)
formula(best_model)
summary(best_model)
```

```{r}
library(quantreg)

formula <- cognitive_performance_score ~ 
  age + bmi + sleep_duration_hrs + sleep_quality_score +
  deep_sleep_percentage + exercise_day + steps_that_day +
  stress_score

lm2 <- lm(formula, data = data1)

taus <- c(0.10, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 0.90)

qr_models <- lapply(taus, function(tau) {
  rq(formula, data = data1, tau = tau, method = "br")
})

y_true <- data1$cognitive_performance_score

pred_lm <- predict(lm2, newdata = data1)

pred_rq <- lapply(qr_models, function(m) {
  predict(m, newdata = data1)
})

mae <- function(y, yhat) mean(abs(y - yhat), na.rm = TRUE)

mae_lm <- mae(y_true, pred_lm)

mae_rq <- sapply(pred_rq, function(p) mae(y_true, p))
names(mae_rq) <- paste0("tau_", taus)

mae_lm
mae_rq
```

```{r}
plot(data = data1, sleep_quality_score ~ sleep_duration_hrs)

```
